data.narrative: Finished Module 8 by verifying integration contracts, identifying a booking status mismatch, and documenting prevention with shared enums and contract tests.

dimension_scores.observation: The student traced the final integration back to the original requirements and flagged simplified scope choices.
The student chose incremental integration and prioritized the most contract-heavy workstream first.
The student identified the booking status contract mismatch as the key integration risk to fix.
The final fix plan specified the shared status contract and prevention steps clearly.
The student documented a coherent fix and prevention plan without discarding prior integration work.
dimension_scores.evidence: Updated the integration checklist and fix artifacts after the break scenario.

dimension_scores.observation: The student found a non-obvious contract mismatch and proposed a systemic prevention strategy.
dimension_scores.evidence: Documented the status enum mismatch between booking service and provider dashboard.

strengths: Identified a hidden integration mismatch and turned it into a shared contract improvement.
growth_areas: Translate these updated plans into executable integration tests earlier in the build.
data.recommendation: For the next skill, start with an explicit shared contract or schema on day one to catch integration mismatches sooner.

public_evidence.student_action: Documented the final integration fix and long-term prevention steps for status contract mismatches.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Shared booking status enum and contract testing recommendation.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Shows the ability to turn an integration bug into a process improvement.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Created module-08-break-scenario.md showing a contract mismatch.
Created module-08-traceability-matrix.md mapping requirements to implementation.

teaching_approaches.detail: Documented a shared status enum fix and prevention strategy.
